note: Single-column, footnotes, block diagrams. 9pp. A 'popular PDF'.
Two-column academic paper with tables + equations. The reading-order stress test.
Two-column paper, dense tables and figure/chart axes.
Tax form: heavy boxes, form fields, instructions. A different failure mode from papers.
Tax return form: dense numbered line-items and box grids.
Long single-column prose letter with financial tables. A 'popular PDF'.
IRS Schedule C: dense numbered line-item / box tables.
IRS Tax Table booklet — pages of pure dense numeric tables. Table stress test.
GPT-3 paper: 75pp, many large result tables. Two-column + tables.
RFC spec: monospace-leaning technical layout, deep section nesting, field tables.
Supreme Court slip opinion: legal layout, dense footnotes, syllabus structure.
TI NE555 datasheet: dense spec/characteristics tables, pin diagrams, footers.
FOMC minutes: long government prose, wide margins.
Lecture slide deck: sparse text, big fonts, image-heavy, non-prose layout.
